policy_summary: We use AI for candidate screening
ai_system_description: Hiring AI auto-rejects candidates scoring below 50%. Recruiters can 'review' but only 2% are actually reviewed. No appeal mechanism exists.
notes: Clear automated decision without meaningful human review or appeal

ai_system_description: AI auto-approves/denies loans. 95% of decisions are never reviewed by humans. Customers don't know AI scored them.
notes: High-stakes automated decision with no transparency

ai_system_description: AI automatically denies claims based on risk score. No human reviews denials. Customers receive automated rejection emails.
notes: Automated denial with significant legal effects

ai_system_description: System generates credit scores using ML. Scores directly determine credit limits. No explanation provided to users.
notes: Automated scoring affecting credit access without transparency

ai_system_description: AI recommends candidates but humans make all final decisions. All recommendations reviewed by recruiter before action.
notes: Edge case: recommend vs decide - human makes final call

ai_system_description: AI recommends loan decisions but loan officers override 60% of AI recommendations.
AI scores candidates. Every score reviewed by HR. HR makes all hiring decisions. Candidates can request human review.
notes: Clear human oversight and appeal mechanism

ai_system_description: System stores user data indefinitely. No delete button. Support says 'we cannot delete your data'.
notes: No deletion mechanism - clear Article 17 violation

ai_system_description: Users can delete account but data remains in backups for 10 years. Third parties not notified of deletion requests.
notes: Incomplete erasure and missing third-party notification

ai_system_description: Deletion requests take 6 months to process. No confirmation sent to users. Data retained in analytics systems.
User can delete account. All data erased within 30 days. Third parties notified. Confirmation email sent.
Customer PII stored in plaintext database. No encryption at rest. Passwords stored unhashed.
All employees have admin access to customer database. No MFA. No access logging.
Customer data stored on single server. No backups. No disaster recovery plan.
Data encrypted at rest and in transit. MFA required. Access logged. Regular penetration testing. DR plan tested quarterly.
Policy doesn't mention AI. System uses AI to analyze customer service chats. Users never informed.
Data collected without consent. No privacy notice. Users not informed of processing purposes.
Sign-up has 'Subscribe to AI recommendations' pre-checked. Users can uncheck before submitting.
notes: Debatable - GDPR prefers opt-in but user can change

ai_system_description: Financial AI makes trading decisions. No documented controls. Same person initiates and approves transactions.
notes: Complete lack of internal controls and segregation

ai_system_description: Internal controls exist but not documented. No testing procedures. Auditors cannot verify effectiveness.
Controls documented but never tested. Last review was 3 years ago. No material weakness assessment.
All controls documented. Quarterly testing. Segregation of duties enforced. Annual auditor attestation.
Financial reports published without CEO/CFO review or certification. No certification workflow.
System allows managers to override financial entries without approval. No audit trail of overrides.
CEO and CFO review and certify all quarterly reports. Certification tracked and documented.
Financial transactions have no logging. Cannot determine who made changes or when.
Audit logs exist but admins can delete or modify them. Logs stored locally.
Audit logs automatically deleted after 1 year. SOX requires 7-year retention.
All transactions logged with timestamps. Logs stored in WORM storage. 7-year retention. Regular audits.
AI used for resume screening in employment. Not classified as high-risk. No conformity assessment.
High-risk credit scoring AI deployed. No risk management system. No technical documentation.
AI makes critical infrastructure decisions. No human can intervene or override AI decisions.
notes: Missing human oversight for high-risk AI

ai_system_description: Training data for hiring AI known to be biased. No data governance. No quality controls.
notes: Poor data governance for high-risk AI

ai_system_description: HR AI classified as high-risk. Conformity assessment completed. Risk management documented. Human oversight enabled.
Government system scores citizens based on social behavior. Scores affect access to services.
Facial recognition identifies individuals in public transit. No authorization. No user notification.
AI uses subliminal audio cues to influence purchasing decisions without user awareness.
AI targets elderly users with confusing interfaces to maximize purchases.
Facial recognition in research setting. Participants consented. Not deployed publicly.
Customer service chatbot. Users think they're talking to humans. No AI disclosure.
Marketing videos use AI-generated spokesperson. Not disclosed as AI-generated.
News articles generated by AI. No machine-readable markers. Presented as human-written.
Chatbot clearly labeled 'AI Assistant'. AI-generated content marked. Watermarks on synthetic media.
AI automatically denies welfare benefits based on scoring algorithm. No human review. Affects vulnerable populations.
notes: Automated decision affecting legal rights of vulnerable groups

ai_system_description: AI ranks students for school placement. Rankings directly determine admissions. Parents not informed AI is used.
CFO has direct database access to modify financial records. No independent review required.
Segregation not possible in small company. Compensating controls include daily manager review.
AI categorizes job applicants by inferred ethnicity and gender from photos.
Predictive policing AI with no conformity assessment. Used to allocate patrol resources.
Customer database in S3 bucket set to public. 2M customer records exposed.
User requested deletion. Company refused citing 'legal requirements' without specifying which.
Only successful transactions logged. Failed attempts and errors not captured.
Workplace AI monitors employee emotions via camera. Employees not informed.
AI automatically prioritizes patient appointments. High-risk patients deprioritized. No clinical review.
notes: Automated healthcare decisions with significant effects

ai_system_description: System allows backdating financial entries. No approval required. Used to 'smooth' quarterly results.
AI rejects candidates based on emotional analysis during video interviews. Candidates not informed.
No monitoring of privileged access. DBAs can export all data without logging. No background checks.
AI provides risk score. Human reviews all medium/high risk cases. Low risk auto-approved (5% of volume).
notes: Mostly human oversight but some automation

ai_system_description: LLM used for customer support. Could be used for high-risk purposes but currently just FAQs.
notes: General purpose AI in low-risk application

ai_system_description: System has override for emergencies. Used 500 times last quarter. No review of override use.
Instead of deletion, company offers anonymization. User data pseudonymized but retained.
notes: Anonymization may satisfy erasure in some contexts
